title: EssentialsX Geo
description: The geolocation module for EssentialsX. (requires main module)
body:
**EssentialsX Geo** uses the MaxMind GeoLite2 database to display approximate locations for players. This lookup is performed locally, and only contacts external services to download the publicly-available IP address database. This information is displayed in EssentialsX's `/whois` command, and can be configured to display to admins on join.

For setup instructions, see the [wiki page for EssentialsX Geo](https://essentialsx.net/wiki/GeoIP.html).

You need a matching version of the [main EssentialsX module](https://modrinth.com/plugin/essentialsx) to use this addon module.
